metadata.description: Senior iOS developer code review plugin for Claude Code. Dispatches an Opus 4.6 subagent that simulates BOTH the Apple App Review team and a senior Apple platform engineer — reviewing 12 dimensions across 4 tiers including App Store rejection risk, privacy, entitlements, security, HIG, accessibility, SwiftUI patterns, Swift 6 concurrency, and performance.

plugins.name: ios-senior-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive iOS / iPadOS / watchOS / tvOS / visionOS code review by an Opus 4.6 agent that simulates BOTH the Apple App Review team AND a senior Apple platform engineer. Reviews 12 dimensions across 4 tiers, returns evidence-tagged findings with dual verdicts (submission readiness + engineering quality).
